use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons with attention-grabbing hover animation
Interactive buttons for navigation menus and links
Form submission triggers with visual feedback on user interaction
Landing page CTA buttons with engaging micro-interactions
ai_summary: A minimalist animated button component featuring a purple background that slides out from behind on hover. The button transitions from a clean white appearance with black text to a fully purple state with white text. The animation uses CSS transforms for smooth easing and creates an engaging hover effect suitable for call-to-action buttons across various web applications.
